content: A 9-phase sequential creative pipeline (concept → worldbuilding → character → plotting → style → drafting → revision → beta-reading → polish) with cross-cutting continuity tracking mirrors the professional author/editorial workflow and produces a natural coordinator hierarchy. Each phase's output becomes the next phase's input, creating clear artifact dependencies. The dual-arc (fantasy+romance) structure requires plotting to happen after both worldbuilding and character development, and drafting's revision↔beta loop needs explicit convergence bounds (maxRevisionBetaCycles=2 with graceful degradation).
sourceEvidence: 9 coordinators mapping to 9 phases: concept-coordinator, worldbuilding-coordinator, character-coordinator, plotting-coordinator, style-coordinator, drafting-coordinator, revision-coordinator, beta-reading-coordinator, polish-coordinator. Plus 3 cross-cutting specialists at orchestrator level. Routing: 163 routes across 20 routing agents with explicit convergence bounds.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
